2259540.name: Hope - Official Soundtrack
2259540.description:
Hope's soundtrack aims to segment the atmosphere, proposal and setting of the game. Made based on a scale of major notes, progression of intentional chords that cause the feeling of challenge and motivation to the player, together with orchestrated instruments that, mixed with the scenery and the sound effects, cause a mystical sensation, which raise the emotions of the player. player and leaves him quite immersed in the game.

Let's recharge our hope?

Note: New game updates with new songs will be added to the songs in this pack at no additional cost.
